starclan.title: A Very Cool StarClan Story
story: m_c tells a compelling story about the goodness of StarClan.
The story is captivating, and the group of cats listen with sparkling eyes, their respect for their ancestors growing.

darkforest.title: A Very Evil Dark Forest Story
story: m_c tells an enthralling story about the power of the Dark Forest.
Though noticeably intimidated by the tale, the group of cats listens attentively, taking its morals to heart.

darkforest.title: The Murky River
story: m_c decides to tell the group a story from ancient Clans.

Long ago, a very evil cat attempted to kill their leader. They lured the leader to a dark and secluded river, where they attempted to drown the leader and take all of their lives. However, when the evil cat's paw touched the water, a pair of paws shot out from the water, grabbed the cat, and pulled them in, sparing the life of the leader.

The cat was dragged deeper and deeper into the water until they emerged onto the riverbank of a blood-red river. The forest around them had died, and hungry eyes shone at them from the shadows that surrounded them. The cat had been taken to the Dark Forest.
The group of listening cats is captivated by the tale, both their fear and respect for the Dark Forest growing.
